headline: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
summary: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released GLM-5.2. Researchers claim GLM-5.2 matches Mythos in cybersecurity tasks. This narrows the AI gap despite general task lags behind US models.

headline: Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
summary: Suno aims to be a streaming destination and break new artists, not just an AI tool. Their new Spark incubator offers grants, mentorship, and marketing support. Program is open to unsigned singers, songwriters, or bands.

headline: China claims the world’s fastest supercomputer
summary: China has reclaimed the title of the world's fastest supercomputer for the first time since 2018. LineShine surpassed El Capitan on the TOP500 ranking. This achievement comes despite strict US trade restrictions on high-powered computing components.

headline: The Cube is Jim Henson’s little-known proto-Black Mirror masterpiece
summary: Jim Henson's 1969 teleplay, "The Cube," is described as a mind-bending, proto-Black Mirror work. It showcases Henson's ability to tackle mature and weird subject matter beyond the Muppets. The film was produced for NBC's "Experiment in Television" anthology series.

headline: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Star Tom Holland Says He's Working to Bring Miles Morales Into the MCU
summary: Tom Holland will return for "Spider-Man: Brand New Day." He's actively working to introduce Miles Morales into the MCU. Holland hopes Peter Parker and Miles Morales will eventually team up.

headline: Marvel Tokon Developers Explain How They Made the Coolest Version of Magneto They Could | Evo 2026
summary: Developers discussed Marvel Tokon at Evo 2026. They explained recent game changes based on beta feedback. The design process for creating their unique Magneto was detailed.

headline: The Best Deals Today: Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade, Criterion Collection Sale, and More
summary: Daily deals are highlighted for gamers. Includes discounts on Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade. A Criterion Collection Sale is also featured.

headline: Christopher Nolan Says Mainstream Movies That 'Play It Safe' Should Take More Risks if They Want to Succeed
summary: Director Christopher Nolan advises filmmakers to take risks. He argues that playing it safe is the biggest risk for mainstream movies. Nolan encourages bolder choices for cinematic success.

headline: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
summary: Two boys were rescued from earthquake rubble in Venezuela. Rescuers spent six hours digging to reach one child. Residents continue manual searches, awaiting heavy machinery.

headline: Chris Mason: Burnham begins to sketch out vision but faces huge and imminent questions
summary: The new MP for Makerfield, [Andy] Burnham, is set to deliver his first major leadership speech. He will outline his vision for the future. Burnham faces significant and immediate challenges.

headline: England captain Ben Stokes says retiring from international cricket 'best thing' for him
summary: England captain Ben Stokes announced his international cricket retirement. He cited feeling "burned out" as the reason. Stokes believes this decision is the "best thing" for him.

headline: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
summary: A plane carrying skydivers crashed in eastern France, killing eleven. The pilot and 10 passengers perished in the incident. Five of the victims were first-time parachutists.
